entries.quiesce: The pre-disable participant closes base Contact Center admission before Orchard mutates the descriptor; new dispatch passes return without claiming work.
entries.drain: Disable waits up to the configured tenant drain timeout for every admitted dispatch pass to release its lease.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell reopens admission; durable messages retain their expected handler ids and resume without silent completion.

entries.quiesce: Orchard stops scheduling the feature-owned task after the tenant shell reloads.
entries.drain: Idle contract requires no retention pass to be running.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell resolves exactly one new task registration.

entries.quiesce: Orchard stops scheduling the feature-owned task after the tenant shell reloads.
entries.drain: Idle contract requires no cleanup pass to be running.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell resolves exactly one new task registration.

entries.quiesce: Orchard stops scheduling the feature-owned task after the tenant shell reloads.
entries.drain: Idle contract requires no availability-recovery pass to be running.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell resolves exactly one new task registration.

entries.quiesce: Orchard stops scheduling the feature-owned task after the tenant shell reloads.
entries.drain: Idle contract requires no reservation-expiry pass to be running.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell resolves exactly one new task registration.

entries.quiesce: The Dialer lifecycle participant closes admission before descriptor mutation; new callback passes return without claiming work.
entries.drain: Disable waits up to the configured tenant drain timeout for admitted callback work.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell reopens Dialer admission and durable callbacks resume.

entries.quiesce: The Automated Dialer lifecycle participant closes admission before descriptor mutation; new pacing cycles return without starting attempts.
entries.drain: Disable waits up to the configured tenant drain timeout for admitted pacing cycles.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell reopens admission and durable campaign work resumes.

entries.quiesce: The Voice lifecycle participant closes admission before descriptor mutation; new inbox passes return without claiming durable deliveries.
entries.drain: Disable waits for admitted inbox work to settle through its existing owner and fence.
entries.reEnable: Admission reopens and the next fresh-scope pass re-evaluates retained durable deliveries without blocking activation.

entries.quiesce: The Voice lifecycle participant closes admission; new scheduled reconciliation passes return without provider or database work.
entries.drain: Disable waits for an admitted reconciliation pass to finish within the configured timeout.
entries.reEnable: Admission reopens and a normal fresh scope performs provider-truth reconciliation within the next minute.

entries.quiesce: The Voice lifecycle participant closes admission; new recovery and direct dispatch passes leave commands durable without a provider call.
entries.drain: Disable waits for admitted command work to settle; sent or outcome-unknown commands remain fenced for later reconciliation.
entries.reEnable: Admission reopens and the next fresh-scope recovery pass re-evaluates retained commands exactly once through durable ownership.

entries.quiesce: Voice admission closes before descriptor mutation; new authenticated webhook requests are rejected before durable ingestion.
entries.drain: Disable waits for admitted endpoint work to finish its durable inbox commit.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell reopens Voice admission and new deliveries use the normal authenticated durable-ingress path.

entries.quiesce: The pre-disable coordinator invokes the Voice participant and atomically rejects new tenant-shell Voice work before the feature descriptor changes.
entries.drain: The participant waits for admitted Voice work up to the validated tenant timeout and fails feature disable closed on timeout.
entries.reEnable: A fresh shell reopens admission and schedules provider-truth reconciliation in a normal scope.

entries.quiesce: Real-Time admission closes and the tenant-local registry aborts every active Contact Center hub connection before descriptor mutation.
entries.drain: Each connection holds a lease until disconnect cleanup unregisters it; disable waits up to the configured timeout.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell reopens registration and admission before new hub connections are accepted.

entries.quiesce: Orchard stops scheduling the feature-owned task after the tenant shell reloads.
entries.drain: Idle contract requires no reconciliation pass to be running.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell resolves one task and runs tenant activation reconciliation.

entries.quiesce: The feature-owned hub route is absent after the tenant pipeline reloads.
entries.drain: Idle contract requires zero connected soft-phone clients.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell maps one hub route and creates new connection state.

entries.quiesce: Orchard stops scheduling the feature-owned task after the tenant shell reloads.
entries.drain: Idle contract requires no automated-activity batch to be running.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell resolves exactly one new task registration.

entries.quiesce: Tenant termination cancels the listener and awaits its run task.
entries.drain: Idle listener shutdown completes after cancellation with no provider event in flight.
entries.reEnable: Tenant activation starts one fresh listener guarded against duplicate starts.

entries.quiesce: The provider feature closes admission before descriptor mutation; every adapter operation rejects new execution after quiesce.
entries.drain: Disable waits for admitted adapter calls to release their provider-feature leases.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell reopens admission and the resolver creates scoped adapters normally.

entries.quiesce: The media feature closes admission before descriptor mutation; new media-session creation is rejected.
entries.drain: Each open media session retains a media-feature lease through StopAsync or disposal, and disable waits for cleanup.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell reopens admission and new scoped media providers can create sessions.

entries.quiesce: The provider feature closes admission before descriptor mutation; every adapter operation rejects new execution after quiesce.
entries.drain: Disable waits for admitted adapter calls to release their provider-feature leases.
entries.reEnable: The fresh shell reopens admission and the resolver creates scoped adapters normally.
